zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda De Savoie於1114年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利時，她的父親Amédée de Savoie III19歲，母親Mathilde d'Albon18歲。她於1146年3月31日與Afonso Henriquez I在法國薩伏伊結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1158年在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉享年44歲，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda De Savoie于1114年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利时，她的父亲Amédée de Savoie III19岁，母亲Mathilde d'Albon18岁。她于1146年3月31日与Afonso Henriquez I在法国薩伏伊结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1158年在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉享年44岁，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda De Savoie was born in 1114, in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Amédée de Savoie III, was 19 and her mother, Mathilde d'Albon, was 18. She married Afonso Henriquez I on 31 March 1146, in Savoie, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1158, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, at the age of 44, and was buried in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda De Savoie est née en 1114, à Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Amédée de Savoie III, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mathilde d'Albon, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Afonso Henriquez I le 31 mars 1146, à Savoie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1158, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda De Savoie 1114 in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amédée de Savoie III 19 und ihre Mutter Mathilde d'Albon 18. Sie hat am 31. März 1146 in Savoyen, Frankreich Afonso Henriquez I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1158 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal und wurde in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda De Savoie è nata il nel 1114 nel Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Amédée de Savoie III, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mathilde d'Albon, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Afonso Henriquez I il 31 marzo 1146, nel Savoia, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1158, nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda De Savoieが1114年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーで生まれた時，父Amédée de Savoie IIIは19歳，母Mathilde d'Albonは18歳であった。1146年3月31日にフランスサボイでAfonso Henriquez Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1158年にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで44歳で死去し，ポルトガルコインブラコインブラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda De Savoie(이)가 1114년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amédée de Savoie III(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde d'Albon(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1146년 3월 31일 프랑스 서아보이에서 Afonso Henriquez I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1158년 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda De Savoie nasceu em 1114, em Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Amédée de Savoie III, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde d'Albon, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Afonso Henriquez I em 31 de março de 1146, em Savoie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1158, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda De Savoie родилась в 1114 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Amédée de Savoie III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde d'Albon, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Afonso Henriquez I 31 марта 1146 г. в местности савои, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1158 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda De Savoie nació en 1114, en Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Amédée de Savoie III, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mathilde d'Albon, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Afonso Henriquez I el 31 de marzo de 1146, en Savoie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1158, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.
